The left side features the interior of the wallet case with three horizontal card slots, each holding a card, and a vertical slot containing a folded banknote. The inner surface of the wallet case displays a decorative floral and butterfly motif that extends from the outer cover design. The right side displays the smartphone with its screen on, nestled within the case, showing the device’s front interface with visible navigation icons at the bottom. The entire composition is set against a plain white background with even, bright studio lighting. The wallet case is positioned flat, open, and centered, with a black wrist strap attached to the top left corner, extending downward.

title: BABEYOND Crystal Rhinestone Tiara Headband Happy Birthday Girl Crown Comb Pin (Multicolor)

variation_files.prompt: A mannequin head with long, wavy blonde hair is shown from the shoulders up, facing forward. The mannequin has a realistic facial appearance with defined eyebrows, large dark eyes, and natural-looking lips. The tiara headband is positioned on top of the head, resting just above the forehead, with its comb-like attachments visible at the back. The background is a plain, solid white, creating a clean and bright studio-style presentation. The lighting is even and soft, highlighting the contours of the face and hair without harsh shadows. The focus is centered on the head and the tiara headband, with no additional objects or text present.
